infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: chawaswildadventures uses your camera to photograph snakes for AI identification.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: chawaswildadventures accesses your photo library to upload snake photos for identification.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: chawaswildadventures uses your location to connect you with nearby experts during emergencies.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: chawaswildadventures uses location for emergency response.
